records.ety: [F. dcembre, from L. December, fr. decem ten; this being the tenth month among the early Romans, who began the year in March. See Ten.]

defs: The twelfth and last month of the year, containing thirty-one days. During this month occurs the winter solstice.
Fig.: With reference to the end of the year and to the winter season; as, the December of his life.
